title: Fact check: Was Candace Owens arrested on harassment charges after alleged Facebook threats?
summary_full: Laura Loomer reignited her feud with Candace Owens by sharing a newspaper archive that allegedly showed Owens faced harassment and threatening charges in 2007. The report claimed Owens sent threatening Facebook messages, though no conviction records have surfaced. The clash escalated after Owens accused Loomer of doxxing and harassment. Loomer denied the allegations and called Owens a “pathological liar,” while warning that legal action could follow as their public social media battle intensifies.
